name: Algiers Attic — Amateur Radio Station
description: An unventilated attic space in Algiers registering 108 degrees Fahrenheit, its floor joists lined with the analog amateur radio equipment and the marine deep-cycle battery that is the only communications link between this pocket of the parish and the emergency operations post across the river.
atmosphericDetails: The battery indicator light has shifted from green to amber — it has been amber for forty minutes
Salt-sweat drips onto the uninsulated terminal connections with a faint hiss that may or may not be real
A stack of handwritten triage sheets weighted down by a spare antenna connector, their ink beginning to run in the humidity
